languages.text: "Я назначаю представителя из числа тех, кто мечтал вернуться в лоно Империума — пришли новые времена, и Заркову пора выйти из изоляции".
"I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."
languages.original_text: "Я назначаю представителя из числа тех, кто мечтал вернуться в лоно Империума — пришли новые времена, и Заркову пора выйти из изоляции".

traits.locale_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearned to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."
"I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."
"I shall appoint a representative from among those who wanted to return to the Imperium — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."
"I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearned to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."
"I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

languages.text: 「帝国に戻りたいと願っていた者の中から代表を任命する。新たな時代が到来し、ザルコフは孤立から脱する時だ」
languages.original_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who wanted to return to the Imperium — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国に戻りたいと願っていた者の中から代表を任命する。新たな時代が到来し、ザルコフは孤立から脱する時だ。」

languages.text: « Je vais nommer un représentant parmi ceux qui souhaitaient regagner l'Imperium. À l'aube de cette nouvelle ère, il est temps pour Zarkov de sortir de son isolement. »
languages.original_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais nommer un représentant parmi ceux qui souhaitaient regagner l'Imperium. À l'aube de cette nouvelle ère, il est temps pour Zarkov de sortir de son isolement. »

languages.text: "İmparatorluk'a dönmek isteyenler arasından bir temsilci atayacağım. Yeni bir çağ başlıyor, Zarkov'un tecritten çıkma zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk'a dönmek isteyenler arasından bir temsilci atayacağım. Yeni bir çağ başlıyor, Zarkov'un tecritten çıkma zamanı geldi."

languages.text: "Ich werde einen Vertreter aus den Reihen derer ernennen, die in den Schoß des Imperiums zurückkehren möchten ... eine neue Epoche beginnt, und es wird Zeit, dass Zarkov seine Isolation hinter sich lässt."
languages.original_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde einen Vertreter aus den Reihen derer ernennen, die in den Schoß des Imperiums zurückkehren möchten ... eine neue Epoche beginnt, und es wird Zeit, dass Zarkov seine Isolation hinter sich lässt."

languages.text: «Nombraré a un representante de entre los que anhelan volver a los brazos del Imperium. Amanece una nueva era y es el momento de que Zarkov ponga fin a su aislamiento».
languages.original_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

traits.locale_text: «Nombraré a un representante de entre los que anhelan volver a los brazos del Imperium. Amanece una nueva era y es el momento de que Zarkov ponga fin a su aislamiento».

languages.text: “我将从那些渴望回归帝国怀抱的人中选一位代表。新时代已经来临，扎尔科夫是时候结束孤立状态了。”
languages.original_text: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."

traits.locale_text: “我将从那些渴望回归帝国怀抱的人中选一位代表。新时代已经来临，扎尔科夫是时候结束孤立状态了。”
